CASE sf-no-slot sr=44100 tempo=128 fileRate=44100 sfSlot=-1 id=7 sampleId=7 type=SOUNDFONT hasSample=0 hasSf=1 root=0:4 detune=128 ticRate=6 slicing=0 markers=- eqSlot=2 rsend=48 dsend=16 sfBank=0 sfPreset=12 sfEnv=-1:-1:-1:-1 sStart=0 sEnd=255 rev=0 loop=off:0:255 drive=0 crush=0 down=0 filter=off:0:0 mods=NONE:NONE:255:0:0:0:128:0:64:0:0,NONE:NONE:255:0:0:0:128:0:64:0:0,NONE:NONE:255:0:0:0:128:0:64:0:0,NONE:NONE:255:0:0:0:128:0:64:0:0 | note=0:4 vel=-1 vol=0x3F800000 pvol=0x3F800000 pan=0x3F000000 start=-1 slice=-1 transpose=0 pit=0 arp=0 tableId=-1 tableRow=-1 pslOff=0x00000000 pslDur=0x00000000 pbn=0x00000000 vibSpd=0x00000000 vibDep=0x00000000
  TEMPO 128
